_note: Living updates feed for one locale, newest first. The sibling .<other>.json holds the translation.

page.lede: New findings, new code releases, new evidence. A four-year cycle. Newest first.

entries.title: Site scaffolded
entries.body: The Velocity White Papers compendium goes live with full structure for sixteen papers plus one placeholder, a TL;DR presentation player, image-inspector transparency, and a bilingual workflow.
